_comment: W6 - ADF pipeline ARTIFACT (evidence-only). Demonstrates Azure Data Factory as a real, version-controlled pipeline that copies the EA 'latest level readings' feed to ADLS as Parquet. Run ON DEMAND only (no scheduled integration runtime) so it costs ~nothing. Import into Data Factory Studio, or deploy via the linked services + this pipeline JSON. Replace <account> in the linked service.
_landing_path_note: Lands at lake/evidence/adf/, deliberately OUTSIDE lake/bronze/** - the dbt bronze glob is abfss://lake/bronze/**/*.parquet, and these raw EA-shaped files have no minted reading_id, so landing them in bronze/ would pollute silver and break the trace. This copy proves ADF works; it does not feed the medallion flow (the Azure Function owns real ingest).
name: pl_copy_ea_levels_to_bronze

properties._linkedServicesNote: ls_ea_rest: REST linked service, baseUrl https://environment.data.gov.uk/flood-monitoring/ , anonymous auth. ls_adls: Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 linked service to <account>, system-assigned managed identity.
properties._datasetsNote: ds_ea_readings_rest: RestResource on ls_ea_rest, relativeUrl 'data/readings?latest&parameter=level&_view=full'. ds_evidence_parquet: Parquet on ls_adls, folder 'lake/evidence/adf/', file 'levels_@{utcnow()}.parquet'.
